name: two-shot-tension
prompt: Two-shot from low angle between seats. Brunette woman (Sera) LEFT, silver-haired woman (Reva) RIGHT. Both looking at each other, the conversation reaching its point. Cool blue-white transport lighting from above creating dramatic shadows. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: some-people
prompt: Close-up. Older woman's face, eyes directly at camera/Sera. Delivering truth without judgment. Sharp features, silver-streaked hair. Expression knowing, almost gentle. Cool blue light from above. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: Some people can't handle that freedom. Some people need the frame. Some people choose the weight because existence without it feels like falling.

sfx.description: soft atmospheric pulse, words resonating, emotional truth settling

name: landing
prompt: Close-up on young brunette woman's face. Words landing somewhere unexpected. Not recruitment, not evaluation — something closer to recognition. Eyes soft with realization, composure intact but something shifting underneath. Cool blue light from viewport side. Light burst beginning behind — halftone fade, revelation dawning. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
